note on sources: keep these texts the same as menaion/07/six_councils.json
day name: Sunday of the Holy Fathers of the First Ecumenical Council of Nicaea
troparia: (Tone 8) Christ our God, You are glorified above all,* You established our fathers as beacons on earth* and through them guided all of us to the true faith.* Glory to You, most compassionate Lord.
kontakia: (Tone 8) The apostles’ preaching and the Fathers’ doctrine* confirmed the Church’s one faith,* and wearing the garment of truth* woven from theology that descends from on high,* she rightly imparts* the mystery of godliness* and sings its glory.
